title: Hallo Janine
writer: Hans Fritz Beckmann, Karl Georg Külb
actors: Marika Rökk, Johannes Heesters, Rudi Godden
plot: The French ballet girl Janine, a gifted tap-dancer, dreams of a musical career in Paris. But first she wants to take revenge on Count René who stood up her best friend Charlotte. Janine wants him to fall in love with her and disap...
